issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and inaccurate. Official text requires: look at top 3 cards, reveal up to 1 FILM type card (excluding Nami), add to hand, place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches without specifying the look/reveal/reorder mechanics.
Filter is {"kind":"Any"} but should specify FILM type cards and exclude Nami by name. Official text: 'reveal up to 1 {FILM} type card other than [Nami]'.

Action sequence incomplete. Must include: (1) look at 3 cards from top, (2) reveal up to 1 FILM card (not Nami), (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only has SearchDeck with no ordering/placement mechanic for remaining cards.
